CapGainsLossTxInvstIncmGrp.PropertyDesc: RECOGNIZED LOSS ON SALE OF INVESTMENTS
RECOGNIZED GAIN FROM SALE OF GYM EQUIPMENT

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: THE FOUNDATION OPERATES A COMMUNITY SWIMMING FACILITY TO PROMOTE INSTRUCTIONAL, RECREATIONAL, AND COMPETITIVE SWIMMING FOR ALL UPPER VALLEY RESIDENTS.

ExplnOfNonFilingWithAGStmt.ExplanationTxt: VERMONT DOES NOT REQUIRE A COPY OF FORM 990-PF TO BE FILED WITH THE STATE.
